lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.CfnAbout: Settings used when Amazon Lex successfully captures a slot value from a user.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.CaptureCondit.Description: A list of conditional branches to evaluate after the slot value is captured.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.CaptureNextSt.Description: Specifies the next step that the bot runs when the slot value is captured before the code hook times out.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.CaptureRespon.Description: Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond the user input.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.CodeHook.Description: Code hook called after Amazon Lex successfully captures a slot value.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.ElicitationCo.Description: Code hook called when Amazon Lex doesn't capture a slot value.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.FailureCondit.Description: A list of conditional branches to evaluate when the slot value isn't captured.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.FailureNextSt.Description: Specifies the next step that the bot runs when the slot value code is not recognized.

lex.bot.slotcapturesetting.FailureRespon.Description: Specifies a list of message groups that Amazon Lex uses to respond the user input when the slot fails to be captured.
